title: Dirty Fest 3 Original Watercolor Painting
source_title: DIRTY FEST 3 ORIGINAL PAINTING BY DAMIAN FULTON
alt: Original colorful Dirty Fest 3 artwork on paper showing a large number three filled with BMX riders and personalities.
summary: “Dirty Fest 3” is an original watercolor painting by Radical Rick creator Damian Fulton, created for the Dirty Fest vintage BMX event. The artwork celebrates old-school BMX culture and features numerous legendary riders alongside the Radical Rick character. As a one-of-one original piece of BMX artwork, the painting represents the influence of Fulton’s illustrations on the visual culture of BMX history.
provenance: Source recorded as Damian Fulton in the Lititz BMX inventory.
claims: People depicted in the artwork are not individually identified in this record unless documented by a supplied source.
details: Created for the Dirty Fest vintage BMX event.
The supplied source page displayed the nonstandard identifier 26.00001; the inventory’s canonical ID is 26.0001.
rights_statement: Artifact images and Lititz BMX descriptive content remain associated with their respective creators, owners and Lititz BMX. Published for historical, educational and preservation access.
